name: Orange and Radish Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Long white radish, about 1 lb in weight
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the white radish, or trim and thinly slice the red ones.
2. Remove the orange peel, including the white membrane, with a sharp knife and cut the fruit into 1-inch pieces. Save any juice.
3. Gently mix the radishes, oranges, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, sugar, and orange flower water (if using).
